metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced metalworking and jewellery design skills including metal fabrication, casting, forming, and finishing techniques. This course emphasizes both traditional craftsmanship and contemporary design innovation in creating functional and artistic metal works.
metadata.general_description: Metal fabrication, jewellery design, casting, forming, and finishing techniques.

big_ideas.statement: Metal working combines material knowledge, technical skill, and artistic vision to create functional art
big_ideas.elaboration: Metal crafts integrate understanding of material properties with design principles and advanced techniques.

big_ideas.statement: Jewellery design balances aesthetics, wearability, durability, and personal expression
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful jewellery combines beautiful design with practical considerations of comfort and durability.

big_ideas.statement: Traditional and contemporary metal techniques offer diverse approaches to artistic expression
big_ideas.elaboration: Both ancient methods and modern technologies provide tools for creative innovation in metalwork.

big_ideas.statement: Professional metalwork requires safety consciousness, precision, quality craftsmanship, and business acumen
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful metal artists combine technical mastery with business skills and professional practices.

competencies.raw: Design jewellery that balances aesthetics, function, and wearability
i_can_statements: I can sketch and develop jewellery concepts
I can design for different body positions and movements
I can consider material properties in design
I can incorporate cultural and personal meaning

competencies.raw: Design metal artistic pieces and functional objects
i_can_statements: I can conceptualize metal art projects
I can plan technical execution
I can design functional metalwork
I can develop series and collections
I can plan technical approaches
I can select appropriate techniques
I can design for material efficiency
I can plan finishing and surface treatments

competencies.raw: Design marketing and business strategies for metal arts
i_can_statements: I can develop brand identity
I can design marketing materials
I can plan production strategies
I can design pricing and business models

competencies.raw: Apply metal fabrication techniques with precision and safety
i_can_statements: I can measure and mark materials accurately
I can cut, file, and shape metal precisely
I can join metals using various techniques
I can work safely with tools and equipment
I can prepare molds and cast metals
I can finish cast pieces effectively
I can form and shape sheet metal
I can execute forging and bending techniques
I can polish and finish metal surfaces
I can apply patinas and oxidation
I can achieve desired surface effects
I can evaluate and refine finishes

competencies.raw: Apply design thinking to solve technical challenges
i_can_statements: I can troubleshoot technical problems
I can adapt techniques for specific goals
I can innovate within traditional frameworks
I can evaluate and improve work

competencies.raw: Use hand and power tools effectively and safely
i_can_statements: I can operate hand tools with skill
I can operate power tools safely
I can maintain and care for tools
I can select appropriate tools for tasks
I can use jeweller's equipment and tools
I can operate torches and soldering equipment
I can use specialized finishing equipment
I can maintain specialized tools

competencies.raw: Use digital design and documentation tools
i_can_statements: I can sketch and design digitally
I can use CAD for design and planning
I can photograph work professionally
I can document techniques and processes

competencies.raw: Use technology for portfolio and business development
i_can_statements: I can create digital portfolios
I can use social media for marketing
I can manage online sales platforms
I can document and present work
